title: SugarCraft — CandyLayout
description: CandyLayout: Constraint-based layout solver — Cassowary simplex + greedy 5-phase fallback for terminal grid layouts.
ogDescription: Two solvers behind a LayoutSolver interface: CassowarySolver (simplex-based, optimal) and GreedySolver (deterministic 5-phase fallback). Swap without touching call-sites.
tagline: Constraint-based layout solver for terminal grids
detailMeta: inspired by ratatui/ratatui layout constraint-solver foundation-package
